name: Beet Borscht 1
recipeIngredient: 2 medium nuggets of salt or juice of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the beef in water that covers it generously. Skim off any impurities.
2. Add the salt (or lemon juice) and sliced, peeled onions and beets to the broth along with sugar and seasoning.
3. Mince the garlic finely and add it to the soup.
4. Cook until the meat is tender, approximately 3 hours.
5. Adjust seasonings as needed and serve hot.
